title: Aranet Overnight CO2 Baseline Drift for Ventilation Degradation
app: Custom HEC or scripted input from Aranet Cloud API / Aranet PRO base station
spl:
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-14d
| eval hour=strftime(_time,"%H")
| eval co2=tonumber(coalesce(co2_ppm, ""))
| where (hour>="22" OR hour<="05")
| timechart span=1d median(co2) as overnight_median_co2 by location
description: Rising overnight CO2 baselines when buildings are empty indicates stuck dampers, fan belts, or schedule bugs.
value: Catches HVAC degradation without occupant complaints.
implementation: (1) Exclude holidays. (2) Compare to outdoor CO2 if available. (3) Handoff to TAB contractor.
grandmaExplanation: We compare night-time air quality baselines to spot ventilation getting worse.
